title: Portolan Access Extension
description: Companion to the STAC Authentication extension. Adds a credential-vending contract: how a client exchanges a verified identity token (obtained via a STAC auth: scheme) for short-lived, scoped storage credentials. Uses the dedicated 'access:' namespace per ADR-0037. See https://github.com/portolan-sdi/portolan-cli/blob/main/spec/extensions/access.md

access:tier.description: Publisher visibility intent. 'listed' = metadata public, data gated; 'private' = metadata also gated. Informational; enforcement is out of band.

endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint that exchanges a verified identity token for short-lived, scoped storage credentials.

scheme.description: Key of the auth:schemes entry (STAC Authentication extension) whose token this endpoint accepts.

audience.description: Token audience the endpoint expects, when the IdP requires it.
